name: Fractal KV-Cache Archives: Lossless Symbolic Storage with In-Place Retrieval for Long-Context LLM Inference (2607.07144)

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: The KV cache dominates memory cost of long-context autoregressive inference. We revisit contractive iterated-map codes that serialize a symbol sequence into low-dimensional real vectors, showing they form a natural archive format for a quantized KV cache. The method is lossless, linear-time, supports O(1) random access and O(1) amortized append. Per-head residual vector quantization reduces the archived cache by 36-54x relative to fp16 cache at a perplexity cost of 11-15%. Keys are roughly 4x mo
